ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the markdown file will also be moved to the new folder.
ast.target: 启用后，markdown 文件也将移动到新文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the original folder structure of the linked files will be retained in the new folder. If disabled, the new folder will be created in the root directory of the vault.
ast.target: 启用后，链接文件的原有文件夹结构将在新文件夹中保留。禁用后，新文件夹将创建在库的根目录中。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Move the current open markdown file itself
ast.target: 移动当前打开的 markdown 文件本身

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No linked files found in the markdown file.
ast.target: 在 markdown 文件中未找到链接文件。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move linked files and update links
ast.target: 移动链接文件并更新链接
